title: atropis distans var. convoluta
intro: Atropis distans var. convoluta, also known as Japanese angelica tree or Convolutus angelica, is a variety of the Atropis distans plant, a member of the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate pain and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Atropis distans var. convoluta include its ability to relieve menstrual cramps, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, this plant is prepared for consumption in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
